case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. RAFAEL M GALAPIN

MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-14-2017 - APPEARANCE BY VIVIAN LEUNG LERCHE, ESQ., SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF DISCOVERY BANK; NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT RAFAEL M. GALAPIN -- PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE IN ORDER FOR PLAINTIFF TO EFFECTUATE DEFAULT PROVE UP AT A LATER DATE IS DENIED, AS TODAY IS THE DAY OF TRIAL. THE COURT THEN GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO DISMISS CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
